data.title: U.S. Supreme Court Ruling on Tariffs Unlikely to Affect Japan's Initial Investment Projects
data.description: A senior Japanese government official has stated that the U.S. Supreme Court's decision to invalidate reciprocal tariffs imposed by U.S. President Donald Trump will not impact Japan's initial investment projects in the United States. According to Jin10, these projects are part of Japan's $550 billion investment commitment, made in exchange for tariff reductions. The official emphasized the importance of these projects for Japan's economic growth and security. Additionally, the official expressed optimism about future investments beyond the second round of projects.

data.title: Pump.fun team-related addresses have sold over $7 million worth of PUMP products in the past two days.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the Pump.fun team's associated address has sold 3.376 billion PUMP in the past two days, obtaining 7.23 million USDC, and now holds only 373.49 million PUMP (worth approximately $788,000).

data.title: Bitcoin holds as Google Trends 'is dead' hits record

data.title: The US SEC clarifies the net capital calculation standards for payment-type stablecoins: a 2% discount rate applies to proprietary trading positions.
data.description: On February 19, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) updated its Q&A regarding Rule 15c3-1 (Net Capital Rule) on its website, clarifying the haircut treatment for broker-dealers when calculating net capital for proprietary payment stablecoin positions. The Q&A states that if a broker-dealer considers its proprietary payment stablecoin holdings to have a "ready market" under Rule 15c3-1, it can apply a 2% haircut based on the greater of the market value of its long or short proprietary positions when calculating net capital. SEC staff will not object to this treatment. Hester Peirce, Chair of the SEC's Cryptocurrency Working Group, subsequently issued a statement supporting this treatment. He emphasized that stablecoins are a crucial infrastructure for blockchain payments and transactions, and proper capital treatment helps broker-dealers utilize stablecoins more effectively in custody, settlement, and tokenized securities-related businesses. She believes that compared to the 100% discount that some brokers might offer out of caution, a 2% discount is more in line with the reserve backing of payment-type stablecoins, which is mainly based on the US dollar and high-quality short-term assets.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $17,200 yesterday, with BlackRock's ETHA leading the way with a net inflow of $1,782,600.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $17,200 yesterday (February 20th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a net inflow of $1,782,600, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.875 billion. This was followed by 21Shares ETF TETH, with a net inflow of $687,700, bringing its historical total net inflow to $17,090,400. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a net outflow of $2,453,100, bringing its historical total net inflow to $2.465 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is $11.141 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) is 4.68%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $11.525 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $88.0422 million yesterday, with BlackRock's IBIT leading the way with a net inflow of $64.4566 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $88.0422 million yesterday (February 20th, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF (IBIT) saw the largest single-day net inflow of $64.4566 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $61.303 billion. The Fidelity ETF (FBTC) followed with a net inflow of $23.5857 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $10.962 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $85.313 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.3%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $54.013 billion.

data.title: Nasdaq is hiring a product manager for digital asset tokenization.
data.description: Nasdaq is hiring a Digital Asset Tokenization Product Manager in New York, responsible for the entire tokenization product lifecycle from concept to large-scale adoption. The position requires 5-10 years of product management experience in fintech or capital markets, with an annual salary ranging from $134,000 to $248,000, plus annual bonuses and equity incentives. Candidates will be responsible for developing tokenization product roadmaps, collaborating with institutional clients to design regulatory-compliant asset tokenization processes, and defining end-to-end workflows from issuance to corporate action. This position offers a hybrid work-life balance, requiring at least three days per week in the office, and applicants must have legal authorization to work in the United States.

data.title: Hong Kong Gold Exchange Collaborates with Alibaba on Blockchain Development
data.description: Hong Kong Gold Exchange held its New Year opening ceremony yesterday, marking the beginning of the Year of the Fire Horse. According to ChainCatcher, during the event, Chairman Zhang Dexi announced that the exchange has officially partnered with a subsidiary of Alibaba Group to develop a blockchain for digital commodities, along with an international precious metals trading platform and settlement system. This initiative aims to unify risk management and regulatory systems for Hong Kong's spot, futures, digital gold, BtoC trading, actuarial center, and over-the-counter (OTC) transactions. The development is expected to be completed within six months, with hopes of integrating into the 'Hong Kong Gold Central Clearing System' established by the Special Administrative Region government.

data.title: SOL Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflows Over Recent Trading Days
data.description: SOL spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $13.17 million during the trading days from February 9 to February 13, Eastern Time. According to Foresight News, the total net asset value of the SOL spot ETF currently stands at $721 million. The ETF's net asset ratio, which compares its market value to SOL's total market capitalization, is at 1.50%. Historically, the cumulative net inflow has reached $875 million.

data.title: Google searches for "Bitcoin is dead" and "Bitcoin is going to go to zero" have both reached record highs.
data.description: According to Google data, the search volume for "Bitcoin is dead" has reached an all-time high, the highest level since the FTX crash. Additionally, the search volume for "Bitcoin going to zero" has also reached a new high.

data.title: OKX's "Collect Five Blessings" event has concluded, with a total prize pool of 28 BTC.
data.description: According to official news, OKX's "Collect Five Blessings" Spring Festival event has ended, with a total of 28 BTC awarded. Users holding the "God of Wealth Blessing" have already participated in sharing the prize pool based on their holdings; specific rewards can be viewed in "Event Center"—"My Rewards". Meanwhile, the winners of the "Hash Lucky Draw" have been announced. The winning number is 449318, and two users won, each receiving a reward of 0.5 BTC.

data.title: International Forum Highlights Humanoid Robots' Industrial Potential
data.description:
The second International Humanoid Robot Forum took place from February 19 to 20 at the Biel/Bienne Innovation Park in Switzerland. According to Jin10, the event gathered representatives from research institutions, businesses, and investors worldwide to discuss the industrialization and development of embodied intelligence in humanoid robots. 

Dominique Gorecki, the forum's chairman and head of the Swiss Collaborative Robotics Competence Center, emphasized in his opening remarks that humanoid robots are transitioning from laboratory research to industrial applications. He highlighted that cross-industry collaboration will be crucial in advancing the implementation of these technologies.

data.title: OKX launches "Welcoming the God of Wealth" livestream event, showering viewers with OKB red envelopes in 6 sessions.
data.description: According to official news, OKX's "Welcoming the God of Wealth" Chinese New Year special live stream has begun. During the live stream, the "Collect Five Blessings" activity will be held, and the grand prize of 1 BTC hash will be announced. In addition, a red packet rain will be distributed during the live stream from 14:00 to 21:00 (UTC+8) on February 21, 2026. There will be 6 red packet rain sessions, each starting on the hour and lasting 45 seconds. Users can enter the activity page through the red packet rain pop-up window after entering the OKX App, and can click the screen when the red packets fall to receive OKB red packets. There is a limit to the number of participants in each red packet rain session, and it's first-come, first-served. Participation requires the OKX App to be updated to version 6.100.0 or above.

data.title: The US Solomon Islands (SOL) spot ETF saw a net inflow of $3.7774 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 20th, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of SOL spot ETFs was $3.7774 million. The SOL spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL), with a net inflow of $3.0485 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $694 million. The second largest was the Franklin Solana ETF (SOEZ), with a net inflow of $728,900, bringing its total historical net inflow to $6.7432 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of SOL spot ETFs is $737 million, with an SOL net asset ratio of 1.53%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $889 million.

data.title: Hong Kong Gold Exchange announces it will develop a digital commodity blockchain.
data.description: The Hong Kong Gold Exchange held its Lunar New Year opening ceremony yesterday. In his address, HKG Exchange Chairman Cheung Tak-hei stated that the exchange has officially partnered with a member company of the Alibaba Group to develop a digital commodity blockchain, an international precious metals trading platform, and a clearing and settlement system. This will provide unified risk control and supervision for all systems in Hong Kong, including spot, futures, digital gold, B2C trading, actuarial center, and over-the-counter (OTC) trading. The system is expected to be completed within six months, and the exchange hopes to connect to the "Hong Kong Gold Central Clearing System" established by the Hong Kong SAR government. (Hong Kong Wen Wei Po)

data.title: Whale 'pension-usdt.eth' Closes BTC and ETH Positions with $1.46 Million Profit
data.description: A significant cryptocurrency whale, identified as 'pension-usdt.eth,' has closed its Bitcoin and Ethereum positions, securing a profit of $1.46 million. According to ChainCatcher, this information was monitored by Onchain Lens. The whale's strategic move in the crypto market highlights the ongoing activity and potential for substantial gains within the digital currency space.
